_comment: TEMPLATE FILE — Copy to aks-dev.parameters.json (or aks-prod.parameters.json) and fill in your values. The aks-dev.parameters.json file for the shared dev environment is committed so all devs share the same config. For your own environment or production, create a new file and do not commit secrets.

resourceGroupName._comment: Resource group that will be created for all AKS resources

existingServicesResourceGroup._comment: Resource group containing the pre-existing ACR, Key Vault, AI Services. Typically 'bhs-development-public'.

acrName._comment: Azure Container Registry name (without .azurecr.io). Get from: az acr list -g <existingServicesResourceGroup> --query '[].name' -o tsv

keyVaultName._comment: Key Vault name. Get from: az keyvault list -g <existingServicesResourceGroup> --query '[].name' -o tsv

speechAccountName._comment: Azure Speech or AI Services account name (in existingServicesResourceGroup)

aiServicesAccountName._comment: Azure AI Services / Cognitive Services account name used for OpenAI + Speech

openAiEndpoint._comment: IMPORTANT: Use the custom-subdomain endpoint (*.cognitiveservices.azure.com), NOT the regional endpoint (*.api.cognitive.microsoft.com). The regional endpoint does not support managed identity token auth.

postgresHost._comment: PostgreSQL Flexible Server FQDN. Get from: az postgres flexible-server list --query '[].fullyQualifiedDomainName' -o tsv

postgresUser._comment: Managed identity user for Postgres — must be created via Fix-PostgresRole.ps1 after first deploy

azureAdTenantId._comment: Azure AD / Entra ID tenant ID

azureAdClientId._comment: Entra ID app registration Client ID for the frontend SPA. Run Setup-EntraID.ps1 to create.

azureAdApiClientId._comment: Entra ID app registration Client ID for the backend API. Run Setup-EntraID.ps1 to create.

damImage._comment: DAM model image — pulled from ACR. Must be imported from the DAM release registry.

containerImageTag._comment: Image tag for bhs-api and bhs-web. Use 'development' for dev, 'latest' for prod.
